controller_input_observations.observed_result: Bottom-right gamepad hints appeared after owner pressed the connected physical gamepad.

controller_input_observations.observed_result: Selecting a concrete server reached payment/session-activation boundary instead of the prior TASK-020 connect-device gate.
controller_input_observations.difference_from_task020: TASK-020 safe D-pad path reached connect_device_gate before payment/stream. TASK-022 with connected physical gamepad reached payment wait and then payment QR.

controller_input_observations.observed_result: Settings Gamepad card opened the active gamepad configuration screen for an Xbox Wireless Controller.

closure_ledger.differences_from_task020: Targeted owner-requested recheck opened the active gamepad configuration screen with Xbox Wireless Controller label and bottom-right A/B hints.

closure_ledger.notes: TASK-020 had Search covered; TASK-022 records a separate gamepad focus blocker rather than reusing D-pad coverage as Xbox coverage.

closure_ledger.differences_from_task020: Xbox Button X behaved as an activation path from the catalog card in this sampled state. Start then reached a Steam-account connection boundary; Y/Select/L1/R1 did not visibly change that boundary.
closure_ledger.notes: No external Steam action, QR traversal, payment, stream or session start occurred. B/Back did not recover; force-stop plus explicit relaunch returned to catalog.

anomalies.test_design_implication: Do not copy raw UI text samples into redacted metadata; use category-only summaries.
Use the prior confirmed explicit app component for relaunch on this lane; package-only resolve may fail.
Payment QR recovery should use force-stop plus explicit relaunch after B/Back fail.
Settings subflow entry needs a stronger focus oracle before Button A; logout boundary must be guarded.
Search route needs a clean rail-focus acquisition step in the continuation.
Use an explicit authorized device alias for ADB runtime checkpoints when an offline ADB-over-network endpoint is listed.
Do not treat Xbox face buttons other than A as harmless by default; Button X activated the focused catalog card and led to a protected Steam-account boundary.
Do not require bottom-right hint visibility on every screen unless the physical gamepad is freshly active; record hint absence/presence as conditional.
Active gamepad settings screen needs a safe Close control or stronger focus oracle for recovery; Button B and Android Back did not exit in the sampled state.

final_state.closure_basis: Closed owner-narrowed screen-family inventory for the approved safe Xbox-like/gamepad lane. Owner-critical bottom-right hint behavior, gamepad sleep/hint variability, post-server-selection payment boundary, and Settings active gamepad screen are confirmed. Remaining baseline families are explicitly classified against prior TASK-020 evidence and owner-narrowed TASK-022 scope.

owner_scope_update.summary: Owner reported the physical gamepad can sleep, causing navigation hints to disappear. Owner narrowed the practical audit conclusion: base screens are treated as matching prior remote/D-pad behavior, with the gamepad hint block plus focused checks for post-server-selection behavior and Settings gamepad section.
